name: Skyline Furniture Parsons Barstool
description:
You'll love sitting on the Parsons Barstool Wood from Skyline Furniture as you enjoy Sunday brunch or freshly made cocktails with friends and family. This elegant stool features a hardwood construction for long-lasting use, while padding on the seat and back ensures you stay comfortable. The seat and back of this wood barstool are upholstered in attention-grabbing fabric, adding charm and elegance to your decor.

Overall Width: 19 inches
Overall Height: 44 inches
Overall Depth: 22 inches
Seat Height: 31 inches
Seat Depth: 17 inches
Seat Width: 19 inches
Inside Back Height: 17 inches
Inside Back Width: 17.5 inches
Leg Height: 25.25 inches
